sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 408 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.17. 2. For orders on CMA No.3319/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 03.02.2026 Mr. Shams Mohiuddin Ansari, advocate for the applicant. Per learned counsel, question before this court has been decided against the applicant by the honourable Supreme Court recently in the judgment reported as 2025 PTD 1230. He states that in view hereof, no question remains to be addressed by this court. Accordingly, the reference application is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
